claim_text: Pinterest announced an agreement to acquire tvScientific.
Pinterest framed acquisition as expansion of performance advertising into CTV.
Pinterest reported 600M+ monthly active users in acquisition release.
SEC filing disclosed transaction close date for tvScientific acquisition.
SEC filing included Pinterest Q1 2026 revenue guidance update.
tvScientific now should be assessed in context of Pinterest platform integration.
notes_on_limitations: Inference from acquisition and close disclosures.

claim_text: Public disclosures do not provide tvScientific standalone revenue breakout post-close.
Public disclosures provide limited granular supply-path transparency for tvScientific.
MNTN provides public SEC transparency as benchmark contrast.
Tatari publicly emphasizes convergent TV execution.
Viant publicly emphasized direct CTV access expansion in 2025.
Integration success risk hinges on execution speed of product and reporting integration.
tvScientific/Pinterest threat is likely strongest among Pinterest-native performance advertisers.
